CGTN's Li Dongning spoke with China's first Winter Olympic champion, Yang Yang. In 2002, she won a gold medal at the Salt Lake City Games in the women's 500 meters in short track speed skating. She holds an impressive collection of 59 world championship titles, and she will serve at the Paris Games as the vice president of the World Anti-Doping Agency. Let's hear what she has to say to the Olympic athletes.
